channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street lights not been working for weeks, 12th April
item.description:
All street lights in cul de sac permanently out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Beeches Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole on Climperwell road, 12th April
item.description:
Just before you come into brimpsfield after the entrance to brimpsfield park on the left side of climperwell road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severe damage to pavement on Norwich Drive nr junction with Oxford Way, 12th April
item.description:
Severe damage to pavement on Norwich Drive nr junction with Oxford Way Note: this pavement has been repaired twice in previous year. I suggest that an inspection of the foundations might be in order to establish why this pavement is so unstable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Norwich Drive, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Outside number 23, 12th April
item.description:
Massive deep potholes reported ages ago

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Pilley Lane, Leckhampton, Cheltenham

item.title: Damaged verge and blocked drainage ditch, 12th April
item.description:
Opposite The Rushleys, Rushley Lane, Winchcombe, Cheltenham, GL54 5JE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rushley Lane, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Under the Honeybourne bridge, 12th April
item.description:
Pavement inner edge by bridge wall both sides very dirty with rubble, detritus and poo. Requires a brush and spade to clear as the mechanical cleaner drives straight past. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Street, St Paul’s, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
See location of pin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxenton, Tewkesbury

item.title: Fly tipping, 12th April
item.description:
Looks like a fridge but no sure. Some kind of white goods item On left just before the main entrance to innsworth tech park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth Lane, Innsworth, Tewkesbury

item.description:
On the roundabout and slip road.

item.title: Fallen Tree, 12th April
item.description:
Located along well used for vision tree is causing problems please can we ask the land owner to rectify the issue?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Granna Lane, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light sensors don't detect cyclists, so right filter never activates, 12th April
item.description:
The right turn from Fairview Road onto Portland Street. Individual cyclists aren't detected so the right turn light cycle never activates, unless vehicle traffic joins queue behind. This can take several minutes during the day, and often won't happen at night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairview Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Redundant barrier, 12th April
item.description:
Footpath repairs were carried out a while ago, but a redundant barrier has been left

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, Salisbury Avenue, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 12th April
item.description:
J15 M5 South lots of pot holes in 2 lane section ofM5 where it joins M4 inside lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign is 90 degrees wrong, 12th April
item.description:
The sign directing public to various parts of Cheltenham town centre has been installed in the wrong orientation. It looks like it needs rotating 90 degrees clockwise but each individual direction sign should also be checked for accuracy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185;187, High Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Light has been out for almost two months, 12th April
item.description:
This is the third time I am reporting this. It hasn’t been fixed but my previous report was incorrectly marked as fixed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walnut Close, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No signage for right of way, 11th April
item.description:
From the edge of Coombe hill nature reserve to Blacksmith lane there’s no signs for the footpath despite there being one on the way in(from the canal area) so it’s extremely difficult to walk there responsibly as we don’t want to go off track in/around the nature reserve or into private property.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting still not working, 11th April
item.description:
100 beeches road gl53 8nx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 102, Beeches Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large, deep pothole on Aggs Hill causing vehicle damage – hazardous near bend, 11th April
item.description:
A large and deep pothole is present on Aggs Hill, Cheltenham, on the uphill section just before the sharp left-hand bend near Lower Hewletts Farm (approx. coordinates 51.898985, -2.035868). The defect is deeper than a golf ball and wider than a dinner plate, located within the carriageway in a position that vehicles cannot safely avoid, particularly when travelling uphill towards the bend. The pothole appears to have been present for some time and the surrounding road surface is breaking up, indicating deterioration rather than a sudden defect. There are also multiple similar reports in the immediate area, suggesting this is a known and ongoing issue. This defect presents a clear hazard to road users and has already caused damage to a vehicle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aggs Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
